emails.subject: RE: Producers requesting L/Cs
emails.body: RE: Producers requesting L/Cs Looks like there may have been a little confusion here, but it appears that the deal is still working as before.

emails.subject: RE: Producers requesting L/Cs
emails.body: RE: Producers requesting L/Cs Not at this time. I think as long as Enron is performing, I'm not sure why there is all of this noise. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Producers requesting L/Cs
emails.body: And we will give you something stating or reaffirming our deal, if that is deemed to be necessary. It will be worth the paper it is written on at the moment it is written, but means nothing 1 second later, and that's the problem with these kind of things. I guess my concern is what good will it do anyone? I don't think it's a problem to get, however I do believe we would want to get V&E's opinion at the time we wanted it, that it was necessary/required.

emails.subject: RE: Producers requesting L/Cs
emails.body: agree, V&E and AA need to address documentation needs in this area. Will have Lori handle. Rod Hayslett/ENRON@enronXgate 10/30/2001 05:27 PM
